title: Xtra Silky Saudi Arabian Lentils Tagine
description: A salty, silky one-pot Saudi Arabian dish made with lentils and vegan white wine vinegar, this tagine is a unique and flavorful meal option. It features spherified ingredients and is paleo-friendly.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and drain well.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lentils, salt, black pepper, and water to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the vegan white wine vinegar.
Mix the sodium alginate with a small amount of water to create a spherification bath.
Drop small amounts of the lentil mixture into the spherification bath to create spherified lentils.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with the spherified lentils.
